home.name: Hunter Davidson
home.tagline: Documentary photo essays from the edges of ordinary life.

about.bio: I've spent the last decade photographing the parts of daily life that rarely make the front page — night shifts, small towns, slow recoveries. My work sits somewhere between photojournalism and long-form documentary: I follow one story for as long as it takes to understand it.
about.quote: I'm not interested in the moment a story breaks. I'm interested in everything that happens after — that's where the real picture is.
